# Pull request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it's useful.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build/CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the pull request focused on one topic.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for public API or script-language changes.
- [ ] I ran `dotnet test DialogueSystem.sln`.
- [ ] I used a Conventional Commit-style title or commits.
